series_metadata.series_description: Student waiver, Student Injury/Illness form, Statement of Qualifications, Direct Delivery Request, Rural Community Financial Assistance (RCFA) Application, paper copy Student Applications, Course Attendance Records, and Course Evaluations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area for two years; Upon confirmation data has been entered in database and checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy. ; Microform: Retain for 7 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain electronic data fifty years., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
